site.name: Avernsys
site.description: Avernsys builds B2B software for connected organizations and last-mile delivery optimization.

home.title: Avernsys | Software for Connected Organizations and Route Optimization
home.description: Avernsys builds B2B software that connects organizations and optimizes last-mile operations with ChapterSys and PrimeRoute.

about.title: About Avernsys
about.description: Meet the Avernsys founders and learn how we build thoughtful software for member communities and delivery operations.

contact.title: Contact Avernsys
contact.description: Contact Avernsys to request a demo, ask questions about ChapterSys and PrimeRoute, or discuss a partnership.

chaptersys.title: ChapterSys | Alumni and Member Community Platform
chaptersys.description: ChapterSys is a private community platform for alumni associations and member organizations to discover businesses, build communities, and stay connected.

primeroute.title: PrimeRoute | Last-Mile Route Optimization Software
primeroute.description: PrimeRoute helps delivery teams optimize last-mile routes in seconds with smarter routing, lower costs, and faster deliveries.

hero.description: We build technology that connects people and moves things forward. Two products. One vision.

items.name: ChapterSys
items.description: A private social platform where alumni and members discover businesses, build communities, and stay connected - all in one place.

items.name: Avernsys PrimeRoute
items.description: Enter your orders. Get optimized delivery routes in seconds. Faster deliveries, lower costs, zero guesswork.

titleLines: We build what should already exist.

hero.description: Avernsys was built on a simple belief: technology should connect people and make things work better. That's what we do.

story.title: Our story
paragraphs: Avernsys started with two people who saw gaps in how organizations connect their members and how businesses handle last-mile logistics.

Instead of waiting for someone else to solve these problems, we built the solutions ourselves. ChapterSys reimagines how alumni networks and organizations stay connected. PrimeRoute makes delivery operations effortless.
We're a company that believes in doing fewer things exceptionally well. Two products, built with care, designed to last.

doruk.bio: Former engineer at Amazon, where he built systems that power global logistics at scale. Conducted computer vision research at UCLA, then joined Tesla to work on the perception systems behind autonomous driving. Brings deep expertise in optimization, machine learning, and building technology that operates in the real world.

murat.bio: Comes from the advisory and consulting world, with experience at both PwC and Deloitte - two of the Big Four. Specializes in business strategy, operations, and helping organizations scale intelligently. Understands how enterprises think, what they need, and how to deliver solutions that earn their trust.

items.title: Craft over compromise
items.description: Every detail matters. We obsess over the experience because our users deserve software that feels considered, not just functional.

items.title: Ship what matters
items.description: We solve real problems for real people. If it doesn't serve the user, it doesn't ship.

items.title: Stay lean, move fast
items.description: Two founders. No bureaucracy. We make decisions quickly, iterate constantly, and let the work speak for itself.

hero.description: A private social platform built for organizations and their alumni. Discover businesses, form communities, and stay connected - all in one space.

items.title: Set up your chapter
items.description: Create your organization's private space. Customize branding, set verification rules, and invite your administrators.

items.title: Grow your network
items.description: Invite members by email, link, or integration. Verified alumni join, build profiles, and list their businesses.

items.title: Watch it thrive
items.description: Members discover businesses, form groups, plan events, and stay connected - all organically, all in one place.

features.label: Discovery
features.title: "Find a" - your alumni network on a map.
features.description: Members list their businesses and services on an interactive map. Need a lawyer? A photographer? A caterer? Search, discover, and support fellow alumni. Only verified members appear.

features.label: Community
features.title: Real conversations, real connections.
features.description: Direct messaging, group chats, and community channels built for organizations. No noise, no ads - just the people who matter. Form interest groups, plan reunions, or simply catch up.

features.label: Events
features.title: From campus to calendar.
features.description: Create, share, and manage events effortlessly. Reunions, networking dinners, workshops - your organization's events live where your community already is.

features.label: Business Profiles
features.title: Showcase what you've built.
features.description: Every member gets a profile to highlight their professional journey and businesses. Make your work visible to a community that wants to support you.

cta.description: ChapterSys is built for organizations that value their community. Let's talk about how it can work for yours.

hero.description: Enter your orders. Get optimized delivery routes in seconds. Faster deliveries, lower costs, zero guesswork.

items.title: Enter your orders
items.description: Upload your delivery list - addresses, time windows, package details. Drag and drop or integrate via API.

items.title: We optimize
items.description: Our engine calculates the fastest, most efficient routes in real time. Every variable considered. Every second counts.

items.title: Deliver smarter
items.description: Your drivers get turn-by-turn optimized routes. You get happier customers and lower operational costs.

features.label: Speed
features.title: Results in seconds, not hours.
features.description: PrimeRoute's optimization engine processes thousands of delivery points in real time. No waiting, no manual route planning. Just instant, optimized routes your drivers can follow immediately.

features.label: Optimization
features.title: Every route, mathematically optimal.
features.description: We factor in traffic patterns, delivery windows, vehicle capacity, and driver constraints. The result: fewer miles, less fuel, more deliveries per route - and customers who get their orders on time.

features.label: Integration
features.title: Plugs into what you already use.
features.description: API-first architecture means PrimeRoute works with your existing systems. Connect your order management, warehouse, or e-commerce platform. Up and running in hours, not weeks.

cta.description: Whether you deliver 50 orders a day or 5,000, PrimeRoute scales with you. Let's optimize your last mile.

hero.description: Have a question, want a demo, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.

success.title: Message sent.
success.description: We'll get back to you shortly.
